basic_details.job_title: IIT Madras Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Chief Operating Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Madras website. The last date to submit the application form is 03-06-2026.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advanced degree (PhD Preferred, Master's Minimum) in Engineering/Business Administration/Project Management and Bachelors in Electronics & Communication Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics/ computer Science, Minimum 5 years of industry experience with deep technical understanding of semiconductor/ photonics manufacturing and high level project operational management
qualification.details: Chief Operating Officer: Advanced degree (PhD Preferred, Master's Minimum) in Engineering/Business Administration/Project Management and Bachelors in Electronics & Communication Engineering/ Electrical Engineering/Applied Physics/ computer Science. Experience: A related discipline with a minimum of 5 years of industry experience with deep technical understanding of semiconductor/ photonics manufacturing and high level project operational management.

salary_details.details: Rs. 1,80,000/- to Rs. 2,20,000/- per month (5% increment every year)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
